articles.title: MakerDAO Should “Seriously Consider Preparing” for DAI Depeg: Founder
articles.description: The U.S. Treasury Department's sanctions against Tornado Cash have led MakerDAO founder Rune Christensen to believe that the DAI creator is endangered by its $3.5 billion worth of USDC collateral. articles.description: Summary: Ankr protocol has received fresh capital from Binance Labs, Binance’s venture capital arm. The exact amount invested remains undisclosed at press time. The pair previously collaborated to build out key infrastructure for the BNB Chain. Ankr provides support by delivering DeFi composability to BNB Liquid Staking as well. articles.title: Polygon Maintains Solid Footing As MATIC Balloons By 300% Since June
articles.description: Polygon (MATIC) price prediction relies heavily on the CPI numbers for July. Polygon price soared by 125% since July 1; Analysts spotted a rally of 68% catapulting to an 85% boost in terms of profit. MATIC price has overlapped targets found in the $1.25 mark; retracement is still a possibility at $0.64. A break below the $0.54 mark hints at an invalidation of MATIC’s uptrend movement....

articles.title: Cardano Tests $0.51 Support – Can ADA Reach Safe Zone And Hit $0.67?
articles.description: Cardano spikes by 5% as seen on the daily price chart Bulls likely to touch bullish triangle from $0.67 to $0.69 ADA at risk of retreating to $0.50 Cardano (ADA) price is looking straightforward bullish today bouncing back from yesterday’s dip. articles.title: Decentralized apps on Polygon hit 37,000, rocketing 400% this year
